windows.old_description: Decorating the candles with dried orange slices/herbs.
windows.embed_text_v2: Rows of freshly poured cream soy candles curing in silver and gold tins with paper wick centering bars, beside a printed sheet of 'Fresh Cut Christmas Tree' product labels.
windows.summary_v2: Tour of dozens of freshly poured candles curing in tins with wick bars, then a sheet of printed product labels ready for application.

tags_v2.action: cure poured candles and prepare labels
tags_v2.on_screen_text: Fresh Cut Christmas Tree, Winter Wonderland Collection; EARTHGLOW watermark

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead pan across rows of poured candles in silver tins, each topped with a wooden wick-centering bar holding a wick upright; sticky notes label batches.
Continued pan reveals more tins of cream wax setting up, wick bars across the tops, ambient lighting from above.
Camera moves over additional rows of curing candles in gold/champagne tins on the white shelf, all with wick bars and visible sticky-note labels.
Wider angle on shelves crowded with hardening gold-tin candles, post-it labels reading 'Fresh cut Christmas Tree' tucked between rows.
Cut to a clean white surface with small silver tins of setting wax, each braced with a paper wick bar and a labeled sticky note.
Same array of small silver tins from another angle, wicks held vertical by paper bridges across the rims.
Cut to a sheet of printed pressure-sensitive labels reading 'Fresh Cut Christmas Tree, Winter Wonderland Collection' next to two finished candle tins.
Closer view of the printed label sheet showing repeated 'Fresh Cut Christmas Tree' labels with a tree image, ready to be applied.
